sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101826" key="sxe/dunos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σχέδῠνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔχω, σχεῖν</etym>) <sense id="n101826.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tenacious</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φιλότης</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
